languages.text: "Да благословит Омниссия здравомыслие Вольного Торговца". {n}Генетор фокусирует на вас множественные визоры и склоняет голову. Ни один из его механических глаз не удостаивает вивисектора даже взглядом.{/n}

"May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да благословит Омниссия здравомыслие Вольного Торговца". {n}Генетор фокусирует на вас множественные визоры и склоняет голову. Ни один из его механических глаз не удостаивает вивисектора даже взглядом.{/n}

"May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

languages.text: 「万能の神が、自由開拓者の健全な判断を祝福あれ」{n}ジェネターは複数の視覚装置をあなたに向け、頭を下げる。彼の機械的な目は、解剖師にすら視線を向けない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「万能の神が、ローグトレーダーの健全な判断を祝福あれ」{n}ジェネターは複数の視覚装置をあなたに向け、頭を下げる。彼の機械的な目は、解剖師にすら視線を向けない。{/n}

languages.text: "Hermesih, Hür Tacir'in sağlıklı kararını kutsasın." {n}Genetör, vizörlerini sana odaklayıp başını eğiyor. Mekanik gözlerinden biriyle bile Dirikesimci'ye bakmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih, Hür Tacir'in sağlıklı kararını kutsasın." {n}Genetör, vizörlerini sana odaklayıp başını eğiyor. Mekanik gözlerinden biriyle bile Dirikesimci'ye bakmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Que el Omnissiah bendiga el buen juicio de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente». {n}El Genetor dirige todos sus visores hacia ti e inclina la cabeza. Ni uno de sus ojos mecánicos honran al vivisector con una mirada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Que el Omnissiah bendiga el buen juicio de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente». {n}El Genetor dirige todos sus visores hacia ti e inclina la cabeza. Ni uno de sus ojos mecánicos honran al vivisector con una mirada.{/n}

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚在上，保佑行商浪人的英明决断。”{n}基因士将他的多目镜面甲聚焦于你，微微颔首。他全身的机械眼甚至不屑于施舍给解剖者哪怕一瞥。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚在上，保佑行商浪人的英明决断。”{n}基因士将他的多目镜面甲聚焦于你，微微颔首。他全身的机械眼甚至不屑于施舍给解剖者哪怕一瞥。{/n}

languages.text: « Que l'Omnimessie bénisse {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} pour son jugement avisé. » {n}Le genetor concentre ses nombreuses visières sur vous et incline la tête. Aucun de ses yeux mécaniques ne daigne lancer ne serait-ce qu'un coup d'œil au vivisecteur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Que l'Omnimessie bénisse {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} pour son jugement avisé. » {n}Le genetor concentre ses nombreuses visières sur vous et incline la tête. Aucun de ses yeux mécaniques ne daigne lancer ne serait-ce qu'un coup d'œil au vivisecteur.{/n}

languages.text: "Möge der Omnissiah den gerechten Richtspruch {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} segnen." {n}Der Genetor fixiert dich mit seinen zahlreichen Visoren und senkt den Kopf. Keines seiner mechanischen Augen würdigt den Vivisektor auch nur eines Blickes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Rogue Trader's sound judgement." {n}The Genetor focuses his multiple visors on you and bows his head. Not one of his mechanical eyes dignifies the vivisector with even a glance.{/n}
